overview: TradeLog Journal is a Gen Z-styled trading journal web app with dark mode, neon accents, and glassmorphism panels. It lets traders log trades, import CSV histories, annotate chart screenshots, and analyze performance — with a freemium model that gates full analytics and unlimited entries behind a paid tier.
features: Trade log with pair, direction, entry/exit price, P&L, R:R, strategy/mistake tags, session, notes
CSV import with column mapping wizard to retroactively populate trade history
Chart screenshot upload with annotation tools (arrows, boxes, lines, text labels)
Performance dashboard with win rate, P&L, drawdown, best/worst pairs, weekly/monthly summaries
Freemium model: 5 trades/day and 25 total cap for free, with teaser overlays and upgrade prompts
Stripe checkout placeholder for paid tier upgrade
Gen Z dark mode design with neon accents, glassmorphism, bold typography, smooth animations
